articles.title: A doctor once told her not to run. Now she’s taking on the Boston Marathon.
articles.description:
More than 10 years after surgery at Mass General Hospital for a giant cell tumor in her femur, she’s running Boston in support of the hospital that helped her get there.

The post A doctor once told her not to run. Now she’s taking on the Boston Marathon. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Sydney Southern, a patient at Mass General, is running the Boston Marathon.
She underwent surgery over 10 years ago for a giant cell tumor in her femur.
Her run supports Mass General Hospital, benefiting local healthcare initiatives.

articles.title: The Kennedy Center is giving Bill Maher the Mark Twain Prize
articles.description:
The annual award that recognizes merit in humor is going to the satirist and talk show host who has been critical of President Trump and political correctness.

The post The Kennedy Center is giving Bill Maher the Mark Twain Prize appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bill Maher will receive the Mark Twain Prize for Humor on March 26, 2026.
The award recognizes contributions to satire and comedy, impacting local cultural discussions.
Boston residents may engage in conversations about political correctness and humor following the award.
